case_title: FRANK, LYNN S. et al VS MANSHARDT, PATRICK J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FRANK, LYNN S. FEDER, MARC AS TO DEFENDANT MANSHARDT, PATRICK J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2006, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT MANSHARDT, PATRICK J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANK, LYNN S. FEDER, MARC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANSHARDT, PATRICK J. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $106.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,106.50, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. FEDER, MARC WAS ADDED AS A PLAINTIFF IN THIS ACTION. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS CONSOLIDATED INTO CASE #813517 DUE TO THE FACT THAT BOTH PLAINTIFF'S HAVE A JOINT INTEREST IN THE RECOVERY. COURT COSTS IN CASE #813517 AND IN CASE #813518 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MANSHARDT, PATRICK J.
